content.text:
[cron:ghl-pipeline-health-daily ghl-pipeline-health] GHL PIPELINE HEALTH CHECK: Query GHL opportunities API. Report: 1) Stale opportunities (no activity 3+ days) with contact name, stage, days stale. 2) Contacts with no recent communication (7+ days). 3) Appointments today/tomorrow with missing briefings. 4) Revenue pipeline summary by stage. 5) Hot leads (score 90+) requiring immediate follow-up. Format as Telegram-friendly report with emoji indicators.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:38 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:38 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.name: exec

arguments.command: node "$HOME/.openclaw/workspace/skills/ghl-api.mjs" get-opportunities | Out-File -FilePath "$PWD/.tmp-opps.json" -Encoding utf8; node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.tmp-opps.json','utf8'));const arr=j.opportunities||j.data||[]; console.log('count',arr.length); if(arr[0]){console.log(Object.keys(arr[0]).join(',')); console.log(JSON.stringify(arr[0],null,2).slice(0,2000));}"

arguments.command: node -e "const token=process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN||process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN_TJB||process.env.GHL_TOKEN; const loc=process.env.GHL_LOCATION_ID||'TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; const h={Authorization:'Bearer '+token,Version:'2021-07-28',Accept:'application/json'}; const base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com'; async function get(p){const r=await fetch(base+p,{headers:h}); const t=await r.text(); let j; try{j=JSON.parse(t)}catch{j={raw:t}}; if(!r.ok) throw new Error(r.status+' '+p+' '+t.slice(0,200)); return j;} (async()=>{const pipes=await get('/opportunities/pipelines?locationId='+loc); const arr=pipes.pipelines||pipes.data||[]; console.log('pipelines',arr.length); console.log(arr.map(p=>p.name+':'+p.id).join('\n')); if(arr[0]){const o=await get('/opportunities/search?location_id='+loc+'&pipeline_id='+arr[0].id+'&limit=3'); const opp=o.opportunities||o.data||[]; console.log('sample opp keys',Object.keys(opp[0]||{})); console.log(JSON.stringify(opp[0]||{},null,2).slice(0,1200));} })().catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)});"
